message:
Add build scripts and data pipeline

- Add scripts/build-data.ts for validating prompts and generating registry.json/manifest
- Add scripts/build-cli.sh for building CLI binary for current platform
- Add scripts/build-releases.sh for cross-platform CLI builds with checksums
- Generate registry.json and registry.manifest.json in apps/web/public/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
